backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing a cigarette shop POS system with products, stock, sales recording, and Z-report generation using Map and List data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—backend resetInventory integration in ResetInventory.tsx and a useResetInventory mutation hook in useQueries.ts—to their files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based light/dark theme tokens for colors, borders, and sidebar via CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Azerbaijani language, mobile-friendly viewport meta, and Azerbaijani page title loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all 8 application routes (dashboard, add-stock, record-sale, view-inventory, daily-sales-report, sales-history, reset-inventory, product-management) wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header displaying the shop logo, app name in Azerbaijani, and a back-arrow button on non-home pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Full-page layout wrapper composing the Header, a centered main content area, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGate.tsx: Reusable password prompt component in Azerbaijani with show/hide toggle, client-side validation against a hardcoded password, and mobile-optimized input styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including adding stock, recording sales, fetching stock levels, sales history, Z-report, and adding products. Each mutation invalidates relevant query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens. Also defines reusable utility classes like `.btn-amber` and `.btn-secondary`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AddStock.tsx: Multi-step form page for adding stock to a product, guiding the user through selecting a product, quantity, and purchase price before submitting. Shows a success screen with options to add more stock or return home.
frontend/src/pages/DailySalesReport.tsx: Password-gated page that displays the daily Z-report including per-product sales breakdown and summary totals for revenue, profit, and quantity. Includes a WhatsApp share button that formats and sends the report as a pre-filled message.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders the main dashboard page with a list of navigation action buttons (add stock, record sale, view inventory, etc.) that route to their respective pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/pages/ProductManagement.tsx: Provides a password-gated UI for managing products, allowing admins to add new products by name and delete existing ones, with success/error feedback and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/RecordSale.tsx: Implements a multi-step form (product → quantity → price → success) for recording a sale, using preset options and free-text input, with stock-level validation and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/ResetInventory.tsx: Password-gated admin page that resets all product stock quantities to zero, requiring a two-step confirmation before executing the irreversible operation.
frontend/src/pages/SalesHistory.tsx: Displays a filterable (by product and date range) list of all sales records with aggregated revenue and unit totals, fetched via React Query hooks and shown newest-first.
frontend/src/pages/ViewInventory.tsx: Displays a password-gated inventory page showing current stock levels for all products, with color-coded indicators for low/empty stock and a total count. Fetches data via the `useStockLevels` hook and supports manual refresh.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a mobile-first design system with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/display fonts, border radii, box shadows, and fade/accordion keyframe animations. Includes the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 13) describing a mobile-first Azerbaijani-language POS inventory app with its architecture, existing features, and a list of known bugs to fix (broken add-stock/sale flows, incorrect stock display, missing report fields, and broken admin reset).
